title: Runtime Sanitizers, Dynamic Analysis, and Language Profiles
description: Add runtime instrumentation to native and managed-language test profiles. Learners cumulatively produce a sanitizer and dynamic-analysis matrix through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use AddressSanitizer builds to detect memory safety defects in native code.
Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer with appropriate recover or trap policy.
Select thread, memory, leak, race, or platform sanitizers according to risk and compatibility.
